events.text: Lucas Hernández (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rodrigo Bentancur (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Uruguay 0, France 1. Raphaël Varane (France) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Antoine Griezmann with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  Uruguay 0, France 2. Antoine Griezmann (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Corentin Tolisso.
Cristian Rodríguez (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
Kylian Mbappé (France) is shown the yellow card.
